## Recommended P8.2C implementation target

- Replace the placeholder Service Bus work item executor registration with a real SQL operational runtime executor adapter.
- The adapter should fetch the SQL operational work item by WorkItemId, invoke the existing SQL operational execution boundary, and return the Service Bus execution result shape expected by SqlServiceBusExecutorWorker.
- Preserve existing SqlServiceBusExecutorWorker completion, failure, and dead-letter settlement behavior.
- Do not create a parallel Service Bus message contract if dispatcher and executor message shapes already align.
- Do not add package references unless a compile error proves they are required.
